creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
Sorry for delay, I reviewed your patches and openssh is working well,
but for broken options I suggest to append ' (broken)' keyword to
option label,
to tell user don't use this right now.
Like:
 		GSSAPI		"Enable GSSAPI support (req: KERBEROS) (broken)" off \
 		LPK		"Enable LDAP Public Key (LPK) patch (broken)"	off \
		FILECONTROL	"Enable file control patch (broken)"		off \


And I think you know better openssh code, so You should be new
maintainer of this port.
